content.speakerText: Thanks so much for helping out!
expectedAnswers: Anytime! Let me know if you need anything else.
No worries — I'm here if anything comes up.
Happy to help! Don't hesitate to reach out before the meeting.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了乐意帮助并主动提供后续支持
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气友好、符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'let me know', 'reach out', 'if anything' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your time today.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你今天抽出时间。
expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure. Let’s schedule a quick call next week to review progress.
Glad I could help! Feel free to message me if you have questions later.
Thanks for your time too — I’ll send you the summary by Friday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达感谢并明确后续安排或支持意愿
语言准确性：动词搭配正确（e.g., schedule a call, send a summary）
表达自然度：使用自然口语结构，避免生硬翻译
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'next week', 'feel free', 'send you', 'reach out' 等场景高频词

content.speakerText: Thanks for walking me through this!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你帮我理清这些内容！
expectedAnswers: Of course! I'm always happy to help — just ping me if anything’s unclear.
You're welcome! I’ve attached the notes; let me know if you’d like to go over them again.
No problem! I’ll follow up with you in a couple of days to see how it’s going.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应感谢并主动开启后续沟通或支持
语言准确性：正确使用 'ping me', 'follow up', 'attached' 等职场口语表达
表达自然度：语气轻松但专业，符合同事间自然交流
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'follow up', 'let me know', 'ping me', 'attached' 等场景关键词
